Cavaliers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Raptors in First-Round Matchup | YES (Series Heavily Favors Cleveland) | HIGH confidence**

matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: **Dominant performance**: Cleveland never trailed in Game 2 and has now won 12 consecutive playoff games against Toronto
signals.raw: **Dominant performance**: Cleveland never trailed in Game 2 and has now won 12 consecutive playoff games against Toronto, matching an NBA postseason record for consecutive wins against an opponent[1].

signals.raw: **Toronto's struggles**: The Raptors committed a season-high 22 turnovers in the loss[4], and Brandon Ingram struggled significantly with just 7 points on 3-for-15 shooting[1].

signals.raw:
**Series trajectory**: With a 2-0 lead heading to Toronto for Game 3 on Thursday night[2][3], the Cavaliers are in a commanding position to advance. No team has overcome a 2-0 deficit in a best-of-seven series recently in the playoffs.

The search results do not contain information about rookie-specific developments that would impact predictions.
